options.text: You can find it in the parking lot.
The cashier is on the second floor.
I don't know where the restrooms are.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It's behind the fruit section.' 是一个合理的收银台位置描述，符合超市布局。干扰项 'parking lot' 和 'second floor' 与超市常规布局不符；'restrooms' 与问题无关，属于完全跑题。

content.speakerText: Which line is moving fastest right now?

options.text: The self-checkout line — only three people ahead.
The employee break room — no one is there.
The bakery aisle — they're giving out free samples.
The return counter — it's always the fastest.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'The self-checkout line — only three people ahead.' 符合实际结账场景，使用了关键表达 'self-checkout' 和人数描述。干扰项 'employee break room' 和 'bakery aisle' 不是结账通道；'return counter' 虽然存在，但通常不比普通结账通道快，且语境不符。

content.speakerText: I need to pay quickly — any recommendations?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要快速付款，有什么建议吗？

options.text: Go to the customer service desk — they help with payments.
Use the express lane if you have fewer than 10 items.
Wait until the store closes — then everything is free.
Ask the manager to pay for you.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Use the express lane if you have fewer than 10 items.' 是处理快速结账的典型建议，包含关键表达 'express lane' 和数量限制。干扰项 'customer service desk' 通常不处理常规付款；'everything is free' 是荒谬的；'ask the manager' 不符合现实操作。
